name: Tyler Munis ERP API (Tyler Technologies)
what_it_does: Tyler Munis REST API for local government ERP covering financial management, HR, payroll, and procurement. Enables AI agents to manage general ledger and fund accounting for government financial management, handle accounts payable and receivable for government financial operations, access payroll processing and employee benefit management for government workforce, retrieve purchasing and procurement workflow for government procurement compliance, manage budget development and monitoring for government budget management, handle project accounting and grant management for government program financial management, access utility billing and revenue management for government revenue collection, retrieve human resources and position management for government workforce management, manage cash management and investment tracking, and integrate Munis financial data with state reporting systems, Tyler products, and third-party platforms.
use_cases: Automating accounts payable from government financial agents
Processing payroll from government HR agents
Managing procurement from government purchasing agents
Tracking grants from government program agents
not_for: Private sector businesses without government accounting requirements
Healthcare or education without local government ERP focus
Federal agencies without local/municipal government fund accounting
best_when: A local government (city, county, school district) using Tyler Munis wants AI agents to automate fund accounting, payroll processing, procurement, budget management, and grant tracking.
avoid_when: GOVERNMENT COMPLIANCE RISK: Munis fund accounting enforces GASB (Government Accounting Standards Board) standards — automated fund transfers without proper inter-fund transfer approval creates GASB compliance failures. Government procurement automation must enforce bidding thresholds, sole-source justification requirements, and public bid opening requirements. Payroll automation for government employees must handle union CBA pay rules and FLSA public sector exemptions correctly.

auth.notes: Tyler Munis uses OAuth 2.0. Developer portal at developer.tylertech.com. Webhooks for ERP events. REST API with JSON. Plano, Texas HQ (Tyler Technologies). Public (TYL NYSE). Founded 1966. Tyler Technologies is the largest US government technology company. 10,000+ government clients. Munis is the flagship local government ERP. Competes with Oracle (PeopleSoft), SAP, and New World Systems (also Tyler) for local government ERP.

pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per module and agency size
pricing.notes: Plano, Texas. Tyler Technologies (TYL NYSE). Founded 1966. Largest US government technology company. Munis serves 3,000+ local governments. Tyler acquired New World Systems (2016), NIC (2021), and others. Competes with Oracle PeopleSoft and SAP for large government ERP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: GOVERNMENT COMPLIANCE RISK: GASB fund accounting requires proper inter-fund transfer approval; automated fund transfers without authorization workflow creates GASB compliance failure

Public procurement bidding requirements — government procurement has statutory competitive bidding thresholds; automated PO creation above bid threshold without procurement process creates legal exposure
CAFR/ACFR reporting — Munis financial data feeds annual comprehensive financial reports; automated journal entries must maintain GASB reporting accuracy
Government payroll complexity — FICA exemption for government employees, PERA/PERS pension deductions, and union CBA pay rules create complex payroll calculation requirements

Grant fund tracking — federal grant fund accounting requires separate fund tracking, allowable cost validation, and close-out reporting; automated grant transactions without allowability check creates federal audit findings
Tyler ecosystem integration — Munis integrates with other Tyler products (New Worlds, EnerGov, Courts); inter-Tyler product data flows may require Tyler Connect marketplace configuration
agent_readiness.security_notes: Government ERP. FedRAMP, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Government financial and HR data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Government ERP. FedRAMP, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Government financial and payroll data.
